questions.assertion: Assertion (A): The Pacific Ocean is the largest of the world's five oceans.
questions.reason: Reason (R): It covers an area of approximately 155.6 million km².
opts: (A) Both A and R are true and R is the correct explanation of A
(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A
(C) A is true but R is false
(D) A is false but R is true
questions.explanation: The Pacific Ocean is indeed the largest of the world's five oceans, and its size can be explained by its vast area of approximately 155.6 million km².

(B) Both A and R are true but R is not the correct explanation of A

(D) A is false but R is true
